2 Sit to stand: The ability to come to a standing position from sitting in a chair, wheelchair, or on the side of the bed. effective 10/01/2019
763 GG0170E5_CHR_TRNSFR_INTRIM_CD GG0170E5_CHR_TRNSFR_INTRIM_CD GG0170E5 Mobility: Chair/Bed to Chair Transfer Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Chair/bed-to-chair transfer: The ability to transfer to and from a bed to a chair (or wheelchair). effective 10/01/2019
